title: Top 25 Sales Voices of 2026
subtitle: The most influential practitioners, trainers, and creators shaping how modern sales professionals prospect, close, and grow their careers
methodology: Ranked by cross-list appearances across independent publications (Favikon, Demandbase, Capsule CRM, Clutch, GetAccept, Better Proposals, HippoVideo, and others), LinkedIn engagement, content output, and direct impact on sales practitioners. We evaluated 80+ candidates from these sources and filtered for people whose work actively changes how individual contributors and frontline managers sell.

voices.name: John Barrows
voices.title: Founder & CEO
voices.bio: Trained over 100,000 sales reps in 25+ years, including teams at Salesforce, LinkedIn, Google, Amazon, and Slack. 3x LinkedIn Top Voice with 390,000+ followers. Created Filling the Funnel for prospecting and Driving to Close for deal execution. His Make It Happen Mondays podcast reaches 100,000+ listeners weekly.

voices.name: Keenan
voices.title: Founder & CEO
voices.bio: Author of Gap Selling, the problem-centric methodology that's become required reading at hundreds of sales orgs. His approach shifts reps from leading with features to diagnosing the gap between a buyer's current state and desired outcome. Known for zero-filter takes on why most sales training fails.

voices.name: Morgan J Ingram
voices.title: Founder & CEO
voices.bio: 4x LinkedIn Top Voice who built AMP to help B2B companies grow pipeline through LinkedIn, outbound, and creator-led content. His daily prospecting content reaches millions of impressions per month. Trains reps on multi-channel outbound with shareable playbooks that work for SDRs and AEs alike.

voices.name: Sam McKenna
voices.title: Founder & CEO
voices.bio: Former LinkedIn Enterprise sales exec who broke 13 sales records before founding #samsales, an all-women consulting firm serving 250+ clients. Creator of Show Me You Know Me, a trademarked personalization framework for outreach. Named one of the 100 Most Powerful Women in Sales by Demandbase. 100,000+ LinkedIn followers.

voices.name: Jeb Blount
voices.title: Founder & CEO
voices.bio: 17x bestselling author including Fanatical Prospecting, Sales EQ, and Objections. His Sales Gravy podcast has been downloaded 60 million+ times, making it one of the most listened-to sales shows ever. SalesGravy.com is the most visited sales-specific website on the planet. Keynote speaker and GTM consultant.

voices.name: Josh Braun
voices.title: Founder
voices.bio: Built his reputation teaching non-pushy sales outreach that flips traditional cold calling on its head. His LinkedIn posts on discovery, empathy, and trust-building get massive engagement from reps tired of scripted pitches. Creator of the Badass B2B Growth Guide and Tongue Tied Sales Objection Flashcards.

voices.name: Will Allred
voices.title: Co-Founder & COO
voices.bio: Co-founded Lavender, the AI-powered email coaching tool that's analyzed billions of sales emails. Their data on what gets replies vs. what gets ignored is the most cited email research in the sales community. His breakdowns of real cold emails on LinkedIn are some of the most-shared sales content on the platform.

voices.name: Kyle Coleman
voices.title: Global VP of Marketing
voices.bio: Employee #6 at Looker, helped scale to $2.6B Google acquisition. Then served as CMO at Clari during a near-10x ARR run and later at Copy.ai. LinkedIn Top Voice with 130,000+ followers. Known for tactical prospecting frameworks and content on how AI is changing the SDR function.

voices.name: Jen Allen-Knuth
voices.title: Founder
voices.bio: 18 years selling to C-level executives with $50M+ in career closed revenue. Former Chief Evangelist at Challenger and Head of Community Growth at Lavender. Co-host of 30 Minutes to President's Club podcast. Trains teams at G2, IBM, and Autodesk on defeating buyer indecision, the real competitor in enterprise deals.

voices.name: Marcus Chan
voices.title: Founder & CEO
voices.bio: WSJ and USA Today bestselling author of Six-Figure Sales Secrets. Left a Fortune 500 role leading a 110-person team doing $195M/year, scaled Venli to 7 figures in 18 months. Named a Top Sales Voice by LinkedIn and Salesforce. His clients have collectively generated $950M+ in revenue using his frameworks.

voices.name: Belal Batrawy
voices.title: Founder
voices.bio: 15 years in SaaS sales as one of the first hires at 7 startups, including 3 acquisitions and 2 IPOs. Created the Mic Drop Cold Call Method (Permission, Problem, Provoke, Promise) and the #DeathToFluff movement. Has competed and won against ADP, LinkedIn, Adobe, IBM, and ZoomInfo using 100% outbound.

voices.name: Scott Leese
voices.title: Founder & CEO
voices.bio: Fractional CRO and GTM advisor who's worked with 130+ companies, been part of 15 exits, and helped build 12 unicorns. Amazon bestselling author. Founded the Surf & Sales Summit, which brings together sales leaders for learning outside the conference room. Known for helping startups get from $0 to $25M.

voices.name: Collin Mitchell
voices.title: Co-Founder & CRO
voices.bio: 4x founder who became VP of Sales at 24. Hosts the Sales Transformation podcast, consistently in Apple's Business Top 50. Has built multiple 7-figure companies fueled entirely by outbound. His rapid-fire LinkedIn videos on sales tactics get thousands of views daily.

voices.name: Jason Bay
voices.title: Founder & CEO
voices.bio: Runs Outbound Squad, training B2B sales teams to book more meetings through cold outreach. His cold call openers and email frameworks get widely shared across LinkedIn. Hosts the Blissful Prospecting podcast and has trained teams at Gong, Zoom, and HubSpot on modern prospecting techniques.

voices.name: Armand Farrokh
voices.title: Co-Host
voices.bio: Co-hosts 30 Minutes to President's Club, one of the fastest-growing B2B sales podcasts. Every episode delivers a single tactical playbook in 30 minutes or less. Known for cold call teardowns and live coaching sessions. His no-fluff approach resonates with reps who want scripts and frameworks they can use immediately.

voices.name: Nick Cegelski
voices.title: Co-Host
voices.bio: Co-hosts 30 Minutes to President's Club alongside Armand Farrokh, bringing a practitioner's perspective from years in the trenches as an AE. Their show's format of one tactic, broken down in 30 minutes, has made it a daily listen for SDRs and AEs. Also known for his viral cold call role-play content on LinkedIn.

voices.name: Gabrielle Blackwell
voices.title: Sales Manager & Creator
voices.bio: One of LinkedIn's most-followed SDR leaders, sharing tactical content on frontline sales management, coaching, and career pathing. Her posts on running effective 1:1s, managing up, and building SDR orgs consistently get six-figure impressions. A practitioner voice that first-time managers trust.

voices.name: Chris Voss
voices.title: Founder & CEO
voices.bio: Former FBI lead international hostage negotiator who wrote Never Split the Difference, now a staple in every serious sales rep's library. His techniques (tactical empathy, mirroring, labeling) have been adopted by enterprise teams worldwide. Teaches negotiation at Georgetown and USC.

voices.name: Sarah Brazier
voices.title: Account Executive & Creator
voices.bio: Built one of the largest personal brands in sales while working as an AE, proving you don't need a title to have influence. Her raw, honest content about the daily grind of quota-carrying sales resonates with thousands of reps. Active voice for mental health awareness in sales.

voices.name: Chris Orlob
voices.title: Founder & CEO
voices.bio: Former Director of Sales at Gong where he built the research program that produced the most-cited data on what top reps do differently. Now runs pClub.io, a sales coaching platform. His data-backed insights on discovery calls, demo delivery, and pricing conversations have shaped modern sales methodology.

voices.name: Lori Richardson
voices.title: Founder & CEO
voices.company: Score More Sales / Women Sales Pros
voices.bio: Named a Top Sales Influencer by Salesforce from 2021 to 2025. Author of She Sells and sales coach at Harvard Business School. Founded Women Sales Pros to address the gap in female sales leadership, helping companies build more inclusive and higher-performing revenue teams.

voices.name: Becc Holland
voices.title: Founder & CEO
voices.bio: Became known for writing prospecting sequences that got responses from executives who ignored everything else. Founded Flip the Script to teach reps how to write outbound that doesn't sound like outbound. Her cold email teardowns at SaaStr became some of the most-watched sessions of the conference.

voices.name: Amy Volas
voices.title: Founder & CEO
voices.bio: 20+ years closing $100M+ in sales before founding Avenue Talent Partners, which helps startups hire VP and C-level sales leaders who actually fit. Her LinkedIn content on what separates great sales leaders from mediocre ones is some of the most shared in the startup ecosystem.

voices.name: Jed Mahrle
voices.title: Founder
voices.bio: Runs the Practical Prospecting newsletter and training, sharing bite-sized outbound frameworks that SDRs and AEs can implement the same day. His cold email teardowns and sequencing advice are widely cited across the sales community. Previously an SDR leader who built programs from scratch at high-growth startups.

voices.name: Kevin Dorsey
voices.title: SVP of Sales
voices.bio: Known as KD in the sales community, he's built a massive LinkedIn following through candid content on sales leadership, coaching, and personal accountability. His posts about the gap between what managers say and what they actually do resonate with frontline leaders. Regular speaker at SaaStr and Pavilion events.
